fields.summary: Specifies the arguments used to customize a typeface when cloning it, including variation axis positions, palette selection, and palette color overrides.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` is a ref struct that bundles all the parameters needed to
create a customized variant of an existing typeface via
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)>. You can
specify variation axis coordinates, a color palette index, and per-color
overrides for the palette.

This is a ref struct (stack-only) value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[] coords =
[
    new() { Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"), Value = 700 },
];

var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    VariationDesignPosition = coords,
    PaletteIndex = 0,
};

using var boldTypeface = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the font to use within a font collection (TTC) file.
fields.value: The index of the font within the collection. The default value is <c>0</c>.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the color palette to use from the font's CPAL table.
fields.value: The index of the palette to apply. The default value is <c>0</c>.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the per-color overrides to apply on top of the selected palette.
fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values. Each entry replaces a specific color in the active palette.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation axis design-space coordinates to apply to the typeface.
fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values, one per axis to override.
